Today 4:29p ET - Benzinga
Benzinga's Option Alert Recap From March 20

Stocks ended even across the board today. The DOW JONES INDU AVERAGE INDEX was little changed while advancing and declining issues were tied on the New York Stock Exchange. During the last 5 trading days, the DOW JONES INDU AVERAGE INDEX has gained 0.12% to close at 20,906.
